title: GoTaq Probe qPCR (Promega)
description: Promega probe-based 20 uL qPCR: 2 min 95 C hot-start activation, 40 cycles, no melt curve.

ingredients.name: Forward primer (200 nM-1 uM final; start 900 nM)
Reverse primer (200 nM-1 uM final; start 900 nM)
Hydrolysis probe (100-300 nM final; start 250 nM)

payload.notes: Probe-based (hydrolysis probe) chemistry, so there is no melt curve. Standard cycling shown (95 C 15 sec, 60 C 1 min); for fast cycling use 95 C 3 sec, 60 C 30 sec. Recommended starting point: primers 900 nM each (range 200 nM-1 uM), probe 250 nM (range 100-300 nM); primers and probe are added as 20X stocks (1 uL each per 20 uL). Up to 250 ng template (2-5 uL). The master mix contains no reference dye; if your instrument needs one, add the supplied CXR (ROX-equivalent) dye in bulk to the master-mix tube (2 uL of 30 uM per 1 mL for low-dye, or 33.4 uL per 1 mL for high-dye instruments). 40 cycles. Source: Promega GoTaq Probe qPCR Master Mix Technical Manual TM378, https://www.promega.com/-/media/files/resources/protocols/technical-manuals/101/gotaq-probe-qpcr-master-mix-protocol.pdf
